findings.title: Sensitive endpoint accessible without authentication: /internal/metrics
findings.hypothesis: Internal observability endpoint lacks auth middleware; exposes metrics, health state, error rates to unauthenticated callers

findings.title: Sensitive endpoint accessible without authentication: /internal/health
findings.hypothesis: Internal observability endpoint lacks auth middleware; exposes metrics, health state, error rates to unauthenticated callers

findings.title: Non-admin user can access admin procedure: admin.users.list
findings.hypothesis: Admin guard missing on this procedure

findings.title: Stored XSS: script/event tags returned unsanitized in ticket response
findings.hypothesis: No server-side HTML sanitization; if frontend renders as innerHTML, stored XSS executes

findings.title: FK violation causes 500: assigneeId=non-existent
findings.hypothesis: FK constraint violation bubbles as unhandled 500 rather than user-facing validation error

findings.title: FK violation causes 500: teamId=non-existent
findings.hypothesis: FK constraint violation bubbles as unhandled 500 rather than user-facing validation error

findings.title: System health degraded post-chaos: DEGRADED
findings.observed: status=DEGRADED, reasons=["Latency elevated on /trpc/tickets.create: avg 1350.4ms — threshold 1000ms"]
findings.hypothesis: Active health monitor detects error spike or latency regression from chaos load
